news.t: Is Nvidia a Republican or a Democrat? These political ETFs have voted.
These ETFs let you invest based on political leanings — but taking a stance can be costly
Should Lawmakers Own Stock? New Laws Might Stop It
Subversive Partners with Unusual Whales to Launch Democratic and Republican Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: NANC is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.48%, Alphabet at 6.54%, Microsoft at 5.41%, Applied Materials at 5.27%, and Amazon.com at 4.83%.

overview.description: The Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading ETF (NANC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to broadly invest in stocks purchased or sold by Democratic members of the US Congress and their families. NANC was launched on Dec 7, 2019 and is issued by Subversive.

data.title: Is Nvidia a Republican or a Democrat? These political ETFs have voted.
data.text: ETFs that combine investing and politics tap into investors' polarized views. Why they shouldn't get your vote.

data.title: These ETFs let you invest based on political leanings — but taking a stance can be costly
data.text: ‘There's no guarantee that any one of these funds will do well under a Democratic regime or a Republican regime,' one analyst notes.

data.title: Should Lawmakers Own Stock? New Laws Might Stop It
data.text: Currently, multiple exchange-traded funds—including Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading (NANC) and Unusual Whales Subversive Republican Trading (KRUZ)–track the stock purchases of Senators an...

data.title: Subversive Partners with Unusual Whales to Launch Democratic and Republican Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: Ticker: NANC and KRUZ Funds to invest in equity securities of companies in which sitting members of the U.S. Congress have invested.
